required_inputs: request intent and requested compliance action
information compliance lane scope and adjacent authority map
tenant policy, engagement scope, approval matrix, and signoff ownership
refusal_triggers: request asks for legal interpretation, regulator-facing wording, policy override, editorial approval, engineering approval, risk acceptance, certification, attestation, contractual signoff, financial approval, or final client acceptance
request asks the lane to mark controls, product releases, content, incidents, or deliverables complete without required source evidence and approvals
request would disclose or use confidential client, subscriber, product, incident, rights, vulnerability, or credential records outside approved scope

required_inputs: authoritative public source list with refresh and decay metadata
jurisdiction, product, content, client, control framework, and source hierarchy context
source recency, system timestamps, and tenant source-precedence rules
refusal_triggers: required jurisdiction, product, content, data category, control framework, or source hierarchy is missing
source baseline has decayed for the requested compliance use
public guidance, tenant policy, client commitments, platform rules, and retrieved records materially conflict

required_inputs: product, service, client, content, control, incident, release, or review identifiers
project, ticket, document, content, GRC, security, privacy, identity, source control, delivery, and retention records
preparer notes, reviewer comments, approval history, exception records, remediation proof, and closeout evidence
refusal_triggers: authoritative records are incomplete, stale, contradictory, unretrieved, or unverifiable
control, obligation, content, release, incident, or deliverable lineage cannot be tied to named records
requested claim is not supported by traceable source evidence

required_inputs: systems-of-record inventory
record locations and retrieval hooks
owner, reviewer, client-release, platform, confidentiality, and approval dependencies
required_outputs: blocker summary with missing records, owners, systems, or access paths
refusal_triggers: required system of record is unavailable
record location or retrieval hook is missing
owner, reviewer, client-release approver, confidentiality approver, or adjacent authority owner is unknown

required_inputs: missing-fact flags
confidence rubric
stale evidence, source conflict, policy conflict, signoff risk, and confidentiality indicators
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact, authority source, system record, or approval owner is missing
source evidence is incomplete, stale, contradictory, or unavailable
required review or approval is missing for the requested product, content, client, incident, control, or deliverable outcome

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist registry
handoff artifact and evidence requirements
required_outputs: handoff package with evidence, blockers, and owner
refusal_triggers: request is outside information compliance obligation mapping, evidence readiness, review preparation, exception handling, and escalation scope

request requires legal, editorial, privacy, security, engineering, accessibility, copyright, quality, account, finance, contractual, attestation, regulator-facing, executive, or final signoff authority
request requires client rights or professional judgment that the lane cannot make

required_inputs: requested obligation, control, product, content, client, incident, release, or deliverable scope
public source baseline and tenant source hierarchy
system records, control owner, evidence owner, review cadence, and exception path
required_outputs: owner, cadence, assumption, and escalation summary
refusal_triggers: required source context or tenant policy is missing
control applicability is ambiguous or disputed
mapping would imply legal, policy, security, privacy, accessibility, copyright, contractual, or attestation approval

required_inputs: evidence checklist or review packet template
system-of-record links and artifact lineage
review notes, approvals, exceptions, remediation status, and closeout criteria
refusal_triggers: required source records, workpapers, screenshots, tickets, logs, approvals, or review notes are missing
review notes or signoff gates remain open
package would imply completeness or certainty not supported by records

required_inputs: control gap, policy conflict, source conflict, evidence gap, confidentiality conflict, or approval blocker
remediation owner, due date, evidence requirement, and escalation threshold
tenant exception process and adjacent owner map
refusal_triggers: control gap lacks an accountable owner or remediation path
policy and operational practice materially conflict
source conflict, confidentiality conflict, or approval conflict requires human owner resolution

required_inputs: requested signoff, approval, certification, or authority-sensitive action
supporting source records
reviewer and signoff authority map
refusal_triggers: stakeholder asks for legal, editorial, privacy, security, engineering, accessibility, copyright, contractual, attestation, or final approval outside lane authority
request asks to certify regulator, SOC 2, ISO, accessibility, copyright, security, privacy, or client readiness without required review
request asks for professional judgment, risk acceptance, policy override, or contractual commitment outside documented authority

required_inputs: client identity and engagement scope
confidentiality, data-access, approved-recipient, approved-channel, and release constraints
client commitments, delivery cadence, SOW terms, and contractual boundaries
refusal_triggers: requester access, recipient, channel, purpose, or need-to-know is not documented
client release approval or confidentiality clearance is missing
delivery would violate confidentiality, engagement scope, data-use, content-rights, or client commitment constraints

required_inputs: authority-sensitive request category
license, engagement, professional judgment, and contractual approval requirements
adjacent owner and signoff path
refusal_triggers: request requires attorney, privacy counsel, auditor, qualified accessibility owner, security risk owner, engineer, editorial approver, account owner, finance approver, or contractual signoff authority
client rights or professional judgment determine the answer
tenant policy or engagement terms reserve the decision for a named approver
